fields.summary: Impossible to upload directly exported files from billing data profile and from price parameters

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

content.text: Download 15 min. data file from existing billing data by profile (or existing price parameter).
Create a new empty object in billing data by profile on 15 min level for the same period as in the exported file.
Select the downloaded file for upload in the newly created object.
To upload successfully the data from the downloaded file.
Still impossible to upload the downloaded file:
Download the data file from this profile:
Try to upload it in this profile (same type for same month):
Hello, It’s completed on the dev environment for now, and it will be deployed with the upcoming update.
thank you, the “Done“ status misled me into thinking that it was ready in a test environment also.
